Waiting for host to start a new game…

Welcome

The City is Yours

A new mayor is cleaning up the city—fast. Patrols are shifting, pressure is rising, and a major takedown is coming.

They can't be everywhere at once. Sometimes a zone runs hot. Other times, it's wide open.

Pick your spots, split your resources, and stay off the radar. Build your operation. Read the streets. When it's over, only one crew runs the town.

Setup

Getting Started

3–6 players, 4 rounds. Most resources wins.

Key terms

Crew Your people — always 2, one per chosen zone each round
Resources Ⓡ Your key to success. Place it wisely for a big score! Or a big bust...

Starting out

  • Each player starts with 1 Ⓡ
Each Round

The Allocation

Talk to the table first — coordinate zones to keep heat low, or mislead others into the hot zone while you slip away.

The zones

  • The Docks, The Strip, The Slums

Making your move

  • Choose exactly 2 zones — your crew goes to each
  • Split your Ⓡ between them however you want
  • No Ⓡ? Each zone just gets your crew
  • All moves are revealed once everyone submits
Zone Resolve

The Reveal

Placements are totaled in each zone to determine its Heat level

Highest Hot zone — Cops swarm it. You lose that placement
Middle Business as usual — Everything holds. Gain +1 Ⓡ
Lowest Under the radar — Big score. Your placement triples
Zone Resolve

Zone Ties

Zones can be tied for Heat level

Highest (Tied) Split heat — Cops spread thin. Placement cut in half (rounded down)
Lowest (Tied) On the down low — Still quiet enough. Placement doubles
All Tied Crackdown — Lose 1 Ⓡ per zone where you placed more than just crew
Rules

How It Works

How placements change

  • Each placement is 1 crew plus any Ⓡ
  • When a placement grows or shrinks, it changes the entire amount sent
  • Any gain becomes Ⓡ — you never gain extra crew

After resolving all zones

  • If a crew is lost, recover it
  • Spend 1 Ⓡ for each crew recovered (if able)
Heat

Don't Get Burned

  • End a round with no Ⓡ? You gain Heat.
  • After Round 4: Most Ⓡ wins.
  • Tied? Least Heat wins.
  • Still tied? Both crews win.
Settings
Round Timer Auto-resolve when time runs out
3:00
Home Turf Bonus Players gain +1 resource in their home zone
Crew Recovery Cost Losing crew in a crackdown costs 1 resource
Round Results

Return to the main menu?

End the game and return everyone to the lobby? Scores and round progress will reset.

ALPHA Playtest
